title: My favorite chair at home
summary: Describe your favourite chair at home — where it is, what it looks like, and what you do in it.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a chair you love at home. Say where it is, what it looks like, and what you do in it. Use present simple and prepositions of place.
hintStarters: My favourite chair is in the… It is…
I sit in it every… because…
Next to the chair, there is…
sampleText: My favourite chair is in the living room of our apartment in Seoul. It is a big armchair with a dark blue cushion. The armrests are made of light wood. The chair is in the corner on the left side of the room. There is a small lamp beside it. I sit in the chair every evening after work. I like to read a book in it because the light from the lamp is very good. The chair is wide, so I can put my feet up. It is also very comfortable, so I sometimes fall asleep in it. My cat also likes the chair. She often sits on the cushion when I am not there. On the weekends, I drink tea and look out the window from my chair. The street outside is busy, but inside the chair I feel very calm. This chair is my favourite place in the apartment.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Prepositions of place
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'in', 'on', 'beside', 'in the corner' để nói vị trí: 'The chair is in the corner', 'There is a lamp beside it'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use prepositions of place to describe location: 'in the corner', 'beside it', 'on the left side'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple for routines
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng thì hiện tại đơn cho các thói quen thường xuyên: 'I sit in the chair every evening', 'I like to read a book in it'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the present simple for regular routines: 'I sit in the chair every evening', 'I like to read a book in it'.

sampleTranslationVi: Chiếc ghế yêu thích của tôi ở trong phòng khách của căn hộ chúng tôi tại Seoul. Đó là một chiếc ghế bành lớn với đệm màu xanh đậm. Tay vịn được làm bằng gỗ sáng màu. Ghế nằm ở góc phía bên trái của phòng. Có một chiếc đèn nhỏ bên cạnh nó. Tôi ngồi trên ghế mỗi tối sau giờ làm việc. Tôi thích đọc sách trong đó vì ánh đèn rất tốt. Ghế rộng nên tôi có thể gác chân lên. Nó cũng rất thoải mái nên đôi khi tôi ngủ thiếp đi trong đó. Con mèo của tôi cũng thích chiếc ghế này. Nó thường ngồi trên đệm khi tôi không có ở đó. Vào cuối tuần, tôi uống trà và nhìn ra cửa sổ từ ghế của mình. Con phố bên ngoài náo nhiệt, nhưng trong chiếc ghế tôi cảm thấy rất bình yên. Chiếc ghế này là nơi yêu thích của tôi trong căn hộ.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where is the writer's favourite chair?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'My favourite chair is in the living room'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the room where the chair is located.

mcQuestions.prompt: What colour is the cushion on the chair?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'a big armchair with a dark blue cushion'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the adjective that describes the cushion's colour.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which preposition best completes: 'The chair is ___ the corner.'
mcQuestions.explanation: We use 'in the corner' to describe a position inside a corner space.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer do in the chair every evening?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I like to read a book in it'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the activity the writer does in the chair.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence uses a preposition of place correctly?
options: The lamp is beside the chair.
The lamp is beside of the chair.
The lamp is beside on the chair.
The lamp beside is the chair.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'beside' does not need 'of' after it — 'beside the chair' is correct.
mcQuestions.hint: Check which version needs no extra word after 'beside'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer sometimes fall asleep in the chair?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'It is also very comfortable, so I sometimes fall asleep in it'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the reason linked to how the chair feels.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence is in the correct present simple form?
options: She sit in the chair every evening.
She is sitting in the chair every evening.
She sits in the chair every evening.
She sat in the chair every evening.
mcQuestions.explanation: Third person singular present simple uses -s: 'she sits'.
mcQuestions.hint: The subject is 'she' — check the verb ending.

mcQuestions.prompt: Who else uses the chair when the writer is away?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'My cat also likes the chair'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the animal mentioned in the text.

options: The chair is wide so I put my feet up.
The chair so is wide I put my feet up.
So wide the chair I put my feet up.
I put my feet up so the chair is wide.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'so' connects a cause and a result: 'The chair is wide so I put my feet up'.
mcQuestions.hint: The cause comes before 'so', and the result comes after.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer do in the chair on weekends?
options: Drinks tea and looks out the window
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I drink tea and look out the window from my chair'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the two activities the writer does on weekends.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do people often have a favourite spot at home? What makes a place feel comfortable and personal?
